scripts.sync:sources: git submodule sync --recursive && git submodule update --init --recursive --remote
scripts.test:site: ruby script/validate_catalogs.rb && bundle exec jekyll build --source site-src --destination _site
scripts.test:full: ruby -c script/validate_catalogs.rb && ruby script/validate_catalogs.rb && bundle exec ruby -Itest test/run.rb && bundle exec jekyll build --source site-src --destination _site && ruby script/check_internal_links.rb && playwright test tests/mobile-smoke.spec.js --config=playwright.mobile.config.js
